ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the species */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Full scientific name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the species */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the species */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "habitat" TEXT /* Habitat where the species is commonly found */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "common_names" (
  "common_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each common name */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the common name belongs to */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the common name is in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Common name of the species in the specified language */,
  "dialect" TEXT /* Dialect of the language (if applicable) */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Indicates if the name is the primary common name in that language/dialect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("common_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_common_names_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region or country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the region belongs to */,
  "geo_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates (latitude and longitude) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_regions" (
  "species_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species-region link */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "abundance" TEXT /* Abundance level of the species in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_regions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_regions_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "official_trade_names" (
  "official_trade_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official trade name */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the official trade name belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Official trade name of the species */,
  "regulated_by" TEXT /* Regulatory body overseeing the trade name */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_trade_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_official_trade_names_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the synonym belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Synonym or alternative name of the species */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source or reference for the synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data curator, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the database */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the database was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classifications" (
  "classification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each classification */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species the classification belongs to */,
  "classification" TEXT /* Scientific classification of the species */,
  "authority" TEXT /* Authority or scientist who first described the species */,
  "year_described" INTEGER /* Year the species was first described */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("classification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classifications_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)
